channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: This is probably the most powerful external GPU enclosure around right now — Pluggable's TBT5-AI is the first to explicitly target local LLM and workstation GPU
item.description: Plugable introduces a Thunderbolt 5 GPU enclosure allowing laptops to run large AI models locally using desktop graphics cards.

item.title: Oscars 2026 LIVE: Where to watch, Nominees, Cheapest ways to stream the 98th Academy Awards
item.description: Lights, camera, Oscars! Follow every win, surprise, and red-carpet moment live tonight with us

item.title: The 2026 TechRadar Australian PC Awards — all the winners revealed!
item.description: Across 40 categories, our PC experts pick the gear we rate as the very best you can get

item.title: ByteDance reportedly pauses global launch of its Seedance 2.0 video generator
item.description: The company is reportedly delaying the launch as its engineers and lawyers work to avert further legal issues.

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch Oscars 2026 for FREE
item.description: We uncovered a sneaky way to watch the 2026 Oscars for FREE – from anywhere in the world, without coughing up for a premium streaming subscription. Here's the trick.
